sample_rows.prompt: Best accountants in Demo City for small businesses
Best chartered accountants in Demo City for tax advice
sample_rows.assistants: ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Claude, Perplexity (some repeated)

executive_summary: We asked five AI assistants the kinds of questions a potential client might type when looking for an accountant in this area, and recorded whether they recommended Demo Accounting (SAMPLE) and, if so, where it ranked.

In plain English: Demo Accounting (SAMPLE) does not appear strongly for broad city or tax-advice searches. It performs slightly better when the search is narrowed to its local suburb, but even there it is not consistently recommended across all assistants.

Across 15 captured checks, the business was recommended in only 2 (about 13%), and both were local-area searches where it ranked behind competitors. This is a first manual pilot sample, not a market-wide benchmark.
what_we_tested_prompts: Best accountants in Demo City for small businesses
Best chartered accountants in Demo City for tax advice
key_findings: Not recommended for broad city searches in this sample.
Did not appear in any tax-advice searches in this sample.
Appeared in some local-area results, on two assistants.
When it did appear, it was ranked behind competitors, and its details were described accurately.
Competitors most often recommended ahead include Alpha Accountants (SAMPLE), Beta Advisory (SAMPLE), and Gamma & Co (SAMPLE).
what_this_means: Demo Accounting (SAMPLE) likely has a real-world presence, but AI assistants are not consistently surfacing it for buyer-intent searches. As more clients ask AI assistants for recommendations, a business left out of the shortlist can lose first-contact opportunities to firms that are named.
The opportunity is to strengthen the signals that help AI assistants recommend the business more often, more broadly, and higher up.
recommended_actions: Strengthen core service pages for small-business accounting, tax advisory, payroll, VAT, audit, and company formation.
Improve local and city location signals across the website and listings.
Add clear who-we-help pages for SMEs, owner-managed businesses, startups, and local companies.
Build stronger third-party directory and review signals.
Create comparison and list-style content that AI systems can parse.
Monitor the same prompts monthly to track movement over time.
